# thoth_policy_exceptions (Data Source)

Lists policy exception requests with optional filters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_policy_exceptions" "pending" {
  status = "pending"
  limit  = 50
  offset = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Max records to return.
- `offset` (Number) Pagination offset.
- `requested_by` (String) Filter by requester identity.
- `reviewed_by` (String) Filter by reviewer identity.
- `status` (String) Filter by status (pending, under_review, approved, denied, approved_with_modification).

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Policy exception rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total matching exception requests.
